violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the reach in freezer and the bottom of the prep coolers need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single-use items stored on the floor in the basement dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Underneath the racking in the walk-in cooler and freezer need to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Open employee drinking glasses in the kitchen on prep tables.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop being stored behind a door on the floor in the kitchen. Needs to be placed in a position to properly dry.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
